title: IQ-ME Assessment Session State (v1)

startedAt.description: Unix ms; serialization-only — runtime ceremony uses performance.now() in iqme:reveal-stage payload

seed.description: 128-bit hex from crypto.getRandomValues(); in-memory only per FR7

$comment: Related: docs/adr/iqme-reveal-stage-event-contract.md (state lifecycle drives event emission). v1 contract; any future field addition requires a `version` field bump (currently implicit at v1; v2 will make `version` itself required).
